subject: Formal Request for Assessment Feedback - KV6003
body:
Dear Dr Smith,

I am writing to formally request detailed feedback on my KV6003 Computing Project interim submission, which was returned to me on 15th March with a grade of 52%. While I appreciate the grade, the written feedback was quite brief and I am struggling to understand specifically where I lost marks.

I would be grateful if you could provide more detailed commentary on:
- The literature review section
- My methodology justification
- The system design diagrams

I believe this will be essential for improving my final submission. I am happy to arrange a meeting at your convenience to discuss this further.

Yours sincerely,
Rebecca Lawrence
Student ID: W21045892

subject: Returning Student - Multiple Queries
body:
Dear Dr Smith,

I'm returning to university after a year out on interruption. I have several questions:

1. Do I need to re-register for KV6003 formally or does my previous enrolment carry over?
2. My previous supervisor has left the university — who will be assigned as my new supervisor?
3. I submitted a partial draft before I left. Is this still on record or do I need to start again?
4. Are the module learning outcomes the same as last year or has the curriculum changed?

I'd appreciate a meeting to discuss the transition back.

Thank you,
David Kim

subject: Transfer Between Programmes
body:
Dear Dr Smith,

I'm currently on the BSc Computer Science programme but I'm considering transferring to the BSc Software Engineering programme. I understand there's significant module overlap, including KV5002 and KV6003.

Could you advise on the process and whether my completed credits would transfer? I'd appreciate knowing who the best person to discuss this with formally would be.

Thank you,
Emily Chen
